name: Wasm Workers Server
description: Wasm Workers Server — VMware Labs tool for running WebAssembly modules as HTTP handlers on edge nodes.

seo.title: Wasm Workers Server — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Wasm Workers Server: Wasm Workers Server — VMware Labs tool for running WebAssembly modules as HTTP handlers on edge nodes.

when_to_use: Running WebAssembly HTTP handlers at the edge on any server
Lightweight edge functions without Node.js or V8 overhead
Wasm-based API handlers on CDN edge nodes
Multi-language serverless compute via WASI-compatible runtimes
VMware Labs edge runtime for privacy-focused serverless apps

pros: Run Wasm modules as HTTP handlers easily
Multi-language: Rust, JS, Go, Python, Ruby
Local-first dev, no vendor runtime required
CNCF sandbox project under Wasm Labs
cons: Not a fully managed edge platform by itself
Production deployments need your own orchestration
review.verdict: Nice OSS toolkit for experimenting with Wasm HTTP handlers, but you still need a platform to host it.
review.best_for: Developers prototyping Wasm-based edge handlers across multiple languages
review.not_for: Teams wanting a turnkey managed Wasm edge like Cloudflare or Fastly
